arts.sum: The festive action continues, as Palace head to the south coast to take on Bournemouth at the Vitality Stadium (KO: 15:00 GMT). Follow all the action as it happens on our live blog below!

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace injury news for Bournemouth match - good and bad news on selection front for Glasner
arts.sum: “It look like [he will be]”, said Glasner, talking on Christmas Eve, about the chances of Eze playing against Bournemouth, after the player suffered a foot injury in the first-half against Brighton earlier this month. “Chadi is training with us, [we’re] taking our time,” said Glasner to the South London Press about the Moroccan international who recently completed a half with the academy team as part of his rehabilitation.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Crystal Palace Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Bournemouth will be aiming to continue their fine form under Andoni Iraola when they host Crystal Palace on Boxing Day. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, provided our pred...

arts.ttl: Palace star has been offered to Tottenham for transfer
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou appears to have been on the end of some criticism of late, with Tottenham’s 6-3 defeat at the hands of Liverpool doing the Australian no favours whatsoever. With the January transfer window just around the corner, the chance of bringing new faces in to help propel Tottenham up the Premier League is likely […] The post Palace star has been offered to Tottenham for transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: The Premier League’s best-kept managerial secret taking Bournemouth to new heights
arts.sum: Andoni Iraola has impressed with the Cherries but there’s a limit to how high he can take them

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Crystal Palace: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bournemouth take on Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Boxing Day. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Glasner on Sarr, Mateta & Premier League challenges
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says Ismaïla Sarr and Jean-Philippe Mateta will continue to improve as they continue to add facets to their game.

arts.ttl: Team News: Bournemouth vs. Crystal Palace injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Premier League clash between Bournemouth and Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: The best bits from Palace's Christmas-time training
arts.sum: Christmas Day may be here – but the hard work rarely stops for Crystal Palace, who are fully in pursuit of three points away to Bournemouth on Boxing Day.

arts.ttl: Manager wants Bournemouth player ‘at all costs’ – President willing to table offer for Cherries star
arts.sum: Dean Huijsen was on target for Bournemouth against Manchester United at the weekend. It was his second goal for the club, as the defender also found the back of the net against Tottenham. He has now become a regular for Bournemouth, playing 11 times in the Premier League and has started the last four games The post Manager wants Bournemouth player ‘at all costs’ – President willing to table offer for Cherries star appeared first on Sport Witness.
